items.question: Can I change plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate any charges.

items.question: Is there a setup fee?
items.answer: No setup fees for Essential and Professional plans. Enterprise plans may include setup and migration services.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards, ACH transfers, and can arrange annual billing for Enterprise customers.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 15% discount when you pay annually. Contact our sales team for more information.

items.question: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
items.answer: We'll notify you before you reach your limits. You can upgrade your plan or purchase additional capacity as needed.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required to start.

items.quote: The Professional plan was perfect for our practice. The AI-powered scheduling alone pays for itself by reducing no-shows.
items.author: Dr. Sarah Martinez

items.quote: We upgraded to Enterprise as we expanded to multiple locations. The multi-location management features are invaluable.
items.author: Dr. Michael Chen
